sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n55755" key="katempei/rw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατεμπείρω</orth>, <sense id="n55755.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κατεπείρω, τὴν τοῦ ἐμβρυουλκοῦ καμπήν</ref> </xr> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philum.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg016:23" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16.23</biblScope> </bibl> (s.v.l.).</sense> </entryFree>
